rules.rule_text:
rule EXE_cloaked_as_TXT
{
	meta:
		description = "Executable with TXT extension"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		id = "2188c0fe-71b0-5dee-bde9-f310c66e39c6"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filename matches /\.txt$/is
}

rule_metadata.name: EXE_extension_cloaking
rule_metadata.description: Executable showing different extension (Windows default 'hide known extension')
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule EXE_extension_cloaking
{
	meta:
		description = "Executable showing different extension (Windows default 'hide known extension')"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		id = "78da6129-a11d-5e9e-8eaf-2a18178b7278"

	condition:
		filename matches /\.txt\.exe$/is or filename matches /\.pdf\.exe$/is
}

rule_metadata.name: Cloaked_RAR_File
rule_metadata.description: RAR file cloaked by a different extension
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Cloaked_RAR_File
{
	meta:
		description = "RAR file cloaked by a different extension"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		id = "a3a9ad40-8a39-513d-be95-73f5a909265e"

	condition:
		uint32be( 0 ) == 0x52617221 and not filename matches /(rarnew.dat|\.rar)$/is and not filename matches /\.[rR][\d]{2}$/ and not filepath contains "Recycle"
}

rule_metadata.name: Base64_encoded_Executable
rule_metadata.description: Detects an base64 encoded executable (often embedded)
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Base64_encoded_Executable : FILE
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects an base64 encoded executable (often embedded)"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		date = "2015-05-28"
		score = 40
		id = "0bfc5916-3e63-5601-9f14-65f848c9322b"

	strings:
		$s1 = "TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA"
		$s2 = "TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA"
		$s3 = "TVqAAAEAAAAEABAAAAAAAAAAAAA"
		$s4 = "TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A//8AALgAAAA"
		$s5 = "TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA"

	condition:
		1 of them and not filepath contains "Thunderbird" and not filepath contains "Internet Explorer" and not filepath contains "Chrome" and not filepath contains "Opera" and not filepath contains "Outlook" and not filepath contains "Temporary Internet Files"
}

rule_metadata.name: Gen_Base64_EXE
rule_metadata.description: Detects Base64 encoded Executable in Executable
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Gen_Base64_EXE : HIGHVOL
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Base64 encoded Executable in Executable"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2017-04-21"
		id = "ef919a63-9a29-5624-a084-b92e3578e3a6"

	strings:
		$s1 = "TVpTAQEAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA" wide ascii
		$s2 = "TVoAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA" wide ascii
		$s3 = "TVqAAAEAAAAEABAAAAAAAAAAAAA" wide ascii
		$s4 = "TVpQAAIAAAAEAA8A//8AALgAAAA" wide ascii
		$s5 = "TVqQAAMAAAAEAAAA//8AALgAAAA" wide ascii
		$fp1 = "BAM Management class library"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filesize < 5000KB and 1 of ( $s* ) and not 1 of ( $fp* )
}

rule_metadata.name: Binary_Drop_Certutil
rule_metadata.description: Drop binary as base64 encoded cert trick
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Binary_Drop_Certutil
{
	meta:
		description = "Drop binary as base64 encoded cert trick"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "https://goo.gl/9DNn8q"
		date = "2015-07-15"
		score = 70
		id = "19791e51-d041-524d-80fa-9f3ec54eb084"

	strings:
		$s0 = "echo -----BEGIN CERTIFICATE----- >" ascii
		$s1 = "echo -----END CERTIFICATE----- >>" ascii
		$s2 = "certutil -decode " ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 10KB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: StegoKatz
rule_metadata.description: Encoded Mimikatz in other file types
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

		$s2 = "Rpd3ovN3FlalVtNklLQ0xNNGtOV1BiY0VOVHROT0Zud25CWGN0WS9BcEdMR28rK01OWm85Nm9xMlNnY1U5aTgrSTBvNkFob1FOTzRHQWdtUElEVmlqald0Tk90b2FmN01ESWJUQkF5T0pYbTB4bFVHRTBZWEFWOXVoNHBkQnRrS0VFWWVBSEE2TDFzU0c5a2ZFTEc3QWd4WTBYY1l3ZzB6QUFXS09JZE9wQVhEK3lnS3lsR3B5Q1ljR1NJdFNseGZKWUlVVkNFdEZPVjRJUldERUl1QXpKZ2pCQWdsd0Va" ascii

}

rule_metadata.name: Obfuscated_VBS_April17
rule_metadata.description: Detects cloaked Mimikatz in VBS obfuscation
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Obfuscated_VBS_April17
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects cloaked Mimikatz in VBS obfuscation"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2017-04-21"
		id = "ca60b885-bb56-55ee-a2b3-dea6958883c2"

	strings:
		$s1 = "::::::ExecuteGlobal unescape(unescape(" ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 500KB and all of them
}

rule_metadata.name: Obfuscated_JS_April17
rule_metadata.description: Detects cloaked Mimikatz in JS obfuscation
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)

rules.rule_text:
rule Obfuscated_JS_April17
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects cloaked Mimikatz in JS obfuscation"
		license = "Detection Rule License 1.1 https://github.com/Neo23x0/signature-base/blob/master/LICENSE"
		author = "Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)"
		reference = "Internal Research"
		date = "2017-04-21"
		id = "44abd2c0-5f8d-5a8c-b282-a09853e12054"

	strings:
		$s1 = "\";function Main(){for(var " ascii
		$s2 = "=String.fromCharCode(parseInt(" ascii
		$s3 = "));(new Function(" ascii

	condition:
		filesize < 500KB and all of them
}
